title: osmorhiza longistylis
intro: Osmorhiza longistylis, also known as sweet cicely or sweet fern, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Osmorhiza longistylis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, and also to relieve respiratory problems like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Osmorhiza longistylis can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
